page.title: Build modular reputation strategy reports.
page.description: Start with creator usernames, validate them against the saved profile dataset, and then generate the selected reputation strategy as a PDF report.

campaign.title: Reputation Campaign Strategy
campaign.description: Validate a list of creators first, then generate a reputation campaign strategy around the selected campaign model.

creator.title: Reputation Creator Strategy
creator.description: Validate the creator profile first, then generate a creator-centered reputation strategy with signals, platforms, and collaborators.

mandatoryGate.title: Validation gate is mandatory
mandatoryGate.description: Before any report is generated, the flow always re-runs profile existence validation. Missing usernames block report generation, profiles with update needed are allowed with a visible warning, and successful PDFs are stored in local storage for the dashboard.

summary.description: Review the captured information before generating the PDF report.

empty.title: Nothing captured yet.
empty.description: Start with creator usernames and the summary will update as the form fills in.

values.notUsingCreators: Not using creators for this campaign.

validationPanel.title: Profile validation gate
validationPanel.initialDescription: Add the required creator usernames first to enable validation and the rest of the workflow.
validationPanel.loadingDescription: Checking whether these usernames already exist in the saved profile dataset.
validationPanel.staleDescription: Usernames changed after the last check. Validate again before generating the report.
validationPanel.readyDescription: Existing profiles can continue. Profiles marked as update needed can also continue, but missing usernames block report generation.
validationPanel.preValidationDescription: Run profile validation before report generation. This step is always required before any strategy endpoint.
validationPanel.missingBlock: Review the validated profiles and try again.

submitPanel.title: Generate campaign strategy PDF
submitPanel.description: The downloaded PDF is also saved into local storage for the dashboard.

step1.title: Set the brand goal and creators
step1.description: Choose the brand goal first. If this is a Crisis campaign, you can explicitly decide not to use creators; otherwise, add creator usernames to unlock the rest of the campaign strategy form.

step2.title: Brand brief
step2.description: Capture the brand context and supporting inputs that will guide the strategy recommendation.

step3.title: Campaign strategy setup
step3.description: Choose the audience, timeframe, and campaign model that best match the report you want to generate.

fieldHelp.goalContext: Additional context for the brand goal.

placeholders.brandContext: Share the current business context, positioning, and what is happening around the brand.
placeholders.goalContext: Add context for the goal so the recommendation can weigh the right tradeoffs.

helperText.creatorsDisabled: Creators are disabled for this Crisis campaign while this option is active.
helperText.creatorUsernames: Paste a list, press Enter, or separate usernames with commas.
helperText.crisisOnly: Available for Crisis campaigns. When enabled, the report will be generated without creator usernames or profile validation.
helperText.enableCrisisOnly: Select Brand goal = Crisis to enable this option.
helperText.brandUrls: Optional. Add up to 3 relevant URLs for the brand.

skippedValidation.title: Creator validation skipped
skippedValidation.description: This Crisis campaign is set to not use creators, so creator username validation is not required and the report will be generated with an empty creators list.

submitDisabledReason.missingUsernames: Add at least 1 creator username to unlock the workflow.
submitDisabledReason.invalidUrls: Use valid http or https URLs.
submitDisabledReason.requiredFields: Complete the required fields to enable report generation.
submitDisabledReason.validationRequired: Validate profiles before generating the report.
submitDisabledReason.missingProfiles: Review the validated profiles and try again.

validation.creatorUsernamesLimit: You can include up to 15 creator usernames.
validation.instagramUsername: Use lowercase letters, numbers, periods or underscores, up to 30 characters.

success.downloadedAndSaved: Campaign strategy PDF downloaded and saved locally.
success.downloadedOnly: Campaign strategy PDF downloaded, but it could not be saved locally.

submitPanel.title: Generate creator strategy PDF
submitPanel.description: The downloaded PDF is also saved into local storage for the dashboard.

step1.title: Add the creator username
step1.description: The creator username is the first required input. It unlocks the rest of the workflow and must be validated before report generation.

step2.title: Creator and reputation brief
step2.description: Capture the creator context, reputation goal, and supporting URLs that should shape the strategy.

step3.title: Strategy inputs
step3.description: Add the audience, key platforms, reputation signals, and collaborators that should inform the creator strategy report.

fieldHelp.goalType: Primary reputation goal for the creator strategy.
fieldHelp.goalContext: Additional context for the reputation goal.
fieldHelp.strengths: Strengths within reputation signals to highlight reputational assets.
fieldHelp.weaknesses: Weaknesses within reputation signals to document friction or vulnerable points.
fieldHelp.incidents: Incidents within reputation signals to register relevant facts or episodes.
fieldHelp.concerns: Concerns within reputation signals to highlight active risks or tensions.

placeholders.creatorContext: Describe the creator's current narrative, positioning, and public perception.
placeholders.goalContext: Explain what should change in the creator's reputation over the selected timeframe.
placeholders.collaborators:
Brand One
Brand Two
Management Partner

helperText.creatorUrls: Optional. Add up to 3 relevant URLs for the creator.
helperText.primaryPlatforms: Use one platform per line, up to 6.
helperText.collaborators: Optional. Use one collaborator per line, up to 10.

submitDisabledReason.missingUsername: Add the creator username to unlock the workflow.
submitDisabledReason.invalidUsername: Fix the creator username before continuing.
submitDisabledReason.invalidUrls: Use valid http or https URLs.
submitDisabledReason.requiredFields: Complete the required fields to enable report generation.
submitDisabledReason.validationRequired: Validate the creator profile before generating the report.
submitDisabledReason.missingProfiles: Review the validated profiles and try again.

validation.reputationSignalLineLimit: {{label}} entries must use {{count}} characters or less.

success.downloadedAndSaved: Creator strategy PDF downloaded and saved locally.
success.downloadedOnly: Creator strategy PDF downloaded, but it could not be saved locally.

all_nano_seeding_ugc_flood.title: All Nano "Seeding / UGC flood"
all_nano_seeding_ugc_flood.description: Mix: 20-200 nanos (1k-10k). Goal: UGC, real reviews, mention volume, social proof, and repost-ready content. Ideal for: launches, e-commerce, CPG, restaurants, and early-stage apps. Key: hybrid compensation (product/experience + commission) and a very simple brief.

all_micro_performance_community_trust.title: All Micro "Performance + community trust"
all_micro_performance_community_trust.description: Mix: 10-80 micros (10k-100k). Goal: conversions, clicks, signups, and sales with trust driven by proximity. Ideal for: performance marketing, fintech, courses, beauty, and DTC. Key: codes/UTMs plus performance bonuses.

micro_city_blitz.title: Micro "City Blitz" (by market)
micro_city_blitz.description: Mix: 5-20 micros per city. Goal: local awareness plus traffic to store or event. Ideal for: retail, openings, events, and food delivery. Key: short windows and local hooks.

all_mid_tier_reach_eficiente.title: All Mid-tier "Efficient reach"
all_mid_tier_reach_eficiente.description: Mix: 5-20 mids (100k-500k). Goal: strong awareness without paying macro or mega rates and with solid real CPM. Ideal for: brands with medium budgets that need scale. Key: high creativity and limited exclusivity/rights.

macro_plus_micro_swarm_hero_halo.title: "1-3 Macro + Micro swarm" (Hero + halo)
macro_plus_micro_swarm_hero_halo.description: Mix: 1-3 macros (500k-1M) plus 20-100 micros. Goal: the macro opens the conversation, the micro tier sustains and converts it. Ideal for: major launches and seasonal campaigns. Key: macro with the core message and micros with different angles such as benefits, reviews, or tutorials.

mega_plus_mid_support.title: "Mega + Mid support" (Top-of-funnel + depth)
mega_plus_mid_support.description: Mix: 1 mega (1M+) plus 10-30 mids. Goal: massive reach plus credibility and repetition. Ideal for: national awareness, branding, and PR moments. Key: mids with educational or demo content, not only hype.

mid_plus_micro_always_on.title: "2-5 Mid + Micro always-on"
mid_plus_micro_always_on.description: Mix: 2-5 mids as anchors plus 10-30 monthly micros. Goal: constant presence and brand building. Ideal for: competitive categories such as beauty, fitness, and fintech. Key: 3-6 month contracts and rotating micros to avoid fatigue.

celebrity_plus_community_creators.title: "Celebrity + Community creators" (PR impact + authenticity)
celebrity_plus_community_creators.description: Mix: 1 celebrity plus 20-60 nanos or micros. Goal: PR or earned media plus community legitimacy. Ideal for: repositioning, causes, and cultural campaigns. Key: celebrity for headlines, community for organic conversation.

vertical_experts_authority.title: "Vertical experts" (Authority)
vertical_experts_authority.description: Mix: 5-15 expert creators (micro or mid). Goal: consideration, trust, and education in finance, health, or tech. Ideal for: fintech, B2B, education, and health/wellness. Key: long formats such as YouTube or podcasts plus short cutdowns.

ugc_creators.title: "UGC creators" (follower count does not matter)
ugc_creators.description: Mix: 10-50 UGC creators, sometimes under 10k. Goal: produce ads or paid content without paying creator reach rates. Ideal for: performance ads on Meta or TikTok. Key: pay for production plus usage rights, not for reach.

event_amplification.title: "Event amplification"
event_amplification.description: Mix: 1-2 macros or mega plus 10-30 micros or nanos at the event. Goal: live coverage, FOMO, attendance, and social PR. Ideal for: launches, pop-ups, festivals, and press trips. Key: define moment planning and clear deliverables.

challenge_trend_wave.title: "Challenge / Trend wave"
challenge_trend_wave.description: Mix: 1 mid or macro creator to start plus 30-150 micros or nanos to replicate it. Goal: virality and repeated concept exposure. Ideal for: TikTok, music, and mass consumer products. Key: a very simple mechanic plus incentives.

creator_squad_ambassadors.title: "Creator squad" (ambassadors)
creator_squad_ambassadors.description: Mix: 6-20 creators (micro or mid) for 6-12 months. Goal: consistency plus brand association. Ideal for: lifestyle, sports, beauty, and fintech-friendly brands. Key: contracts with reasonable exclusivity, perks, and monthly content.

retargeting_booster_paid_whitelisting.title: "Retargeting booster" (paid + whitelisting)
retargeting_booster_paid_whitelisting.description: Mix: 5-15 micros or mids with whitelisting approval. Goal: run ads from the creator account for better CTR and stronger retargeting. Ideal for: pure performance. Key: negotiate rights and usage duration for 30, 60, or 90 days.
